expectations.evidence: Report generated and file confirmed at that path

expectations.text: Response mentions CCTV detection results (people detected, violations, or image names)
expectations.evidence: Full per-image table: 0.JPG 2 detected 2 violations, 4.jpg 205 detected 75 violations, etc.

expectations.text: Response tells user where the report file is
Response includes or references model performance summary
expectations.evidence: Full accuracy+AUC table for all 6 multi-class models included
